steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery

steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } window.__artifactDownloadCapture = { filename: '', payload: '', mimeType: '' }; const originalCreate = URL.createObjectURL.bind(URL); URL.createObjectURL = (blob) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.mimeType = blob.type || ''; blob.text().then((text) => { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload = text; }); return originalCreate(blob); }; const originalClick = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click; HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function() { window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename = this.download || ''; return originalClick.call(this); }; })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Selected entry: Forecasting Q3') && text.includes('Template: Forecast Inventory Brief'); })()

(() => { const section = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '')).includes('List ReportDocuments response:')); if (!section) { throw new Error('List response section not found.'); } const button = Array.from(section.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Inspect export')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Selected list entry Inspect export button not found.'); } button.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const summary = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[aria-label="Selected list entry export request summary"]')).find(Boolean); if (!summary) { throw new Error('Selected list entry export request summary not found.'); } const container = summary.closest('.forge-report-builder__chart-inline-notice'); const button = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Download export request')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Download export request button not found.'); } button.click(); return true; })()
window.__artifactDownloadCapture && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.filename === 'Forecasting Q3-savedPayload-pdf-export-request.json'

window.__artifactDownloadCapture && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.mimeType.includes('application/json') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('"title": "Forecasting Q3"') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('"width": 792') && window.__artifactDownloadCapture.payload.includes('"height": 612')
